title: Rich Crisp Argentinian Tofu Stir-fry
description: This rich and crisp dish features marinated tofu as the star of the show in a savory argentine-inspired stir-fry that's perfect for a show-off meal, suitable for nut-free diets.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Press tofu to remove excess water.

instructions: Press the tofu to remove excess water.
Mix chicken broth concentrate, tomato paste, balsamic vinegar, salt, and white pepper in a bowl. Marinate the pressed tofu for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic to the hot pan and sauté until translucent.
Stir-fry the marinated tofu with cumin seed, removing from marinade and reserving it for later if desired. Cook until golden brown on both sides.
Increase heat to high and add red bell pepper and scallions, stir-frying for about 3 minutes.
Pour reserved marinade over the stir-fry mixture, adding salt and white pepper as per taste.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes or until vegetables are slightly softened. Garnish with more scallion rings if desired.
